title: 破镜谋杀案
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\137-破镜谋杀案-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
At a gathering hosted by Marina Gregg at a renovated Victorian-era house in Bermuda, various guests arrive, including Mr. and Mrs. Ackroyd, who join Jason Radley and Blackie Preston for drinks. A bewildered clergyman arrives and is attended to by Ella Jelinsky, while the Bucher couple also joins the party. During the arrivals, Heather Badecock delivers a tedious speech, and Mrs. Alcock expresses discomfort and suspicion regarding the presence of vodka.

During the social interactions, Marina Gregg experiences a moment of intense, frightening shock while staring at a wall near the stairs, though she quickly regains her composure and offers Jason a Kir Royale. Seeking to see the house's renovations, Mrs. Bantry, Mrs. Alcock, and Mrs. Blunt tour the bathrooms. They attempt to peek into the bedrooms, but find all the doors have been locked by the owner. While walking back, Mrs. Bantry observes Mrs. Mivet and Shelley chatting cheerfully outside.

The atmosphere shifts when a commotion is heard near the stairs. Miss Jelinsky hurries past the group, noting that the bedroom doors are locked and that someone is seriously ill. As Jason Radley is seen on the phone, Miss Jelinsky reports that Heather Badecock's condition is very bad, suggesting she may be suffering from a heart or brain attack, or an epileptic fit.
